title: M365 Platform & Power Platform Engineer
description_html: Application Deadline:                07/19/2026      Address:  VIRTUAL(R)59 - REMOTE/TELETRAVAIL - ON - BMO            Job Family Group:        Technology         The M365 Platform & Power Environment Engineer is responsible for the health, integrity, and evolution of the enterprise Microsoft 365  environment—including  identity, collaboration services, messaging integration, and platform security—while also leading the build‑out and governance of the Power Platform ecosystem (Power Apps, Power Automate, Power Pages, Power Platform environments, and Dataverse). You will engineer and operationalize core M365 services while enabling a scalable, secure, and compliant Power Platform foundation aligned with enterprise standards.  This role is central to the modernization of M365 services and the expansion of Power Platform capabilities that support automation, app development, AI‑enabled experiences, and business innovation.     Key Responsibilities    M365 Platform Engineering & Operations    Own and manage the full M365 ecosystem, including SharePoint, OneDrive, Teams, Exchange Online, and identity/security integrations with on‑prem Active Directory and Entra ID  Ensure platform reliability, availability, tenant hygiene, configuration currency, and alignment with enterprise security and compliance policies.  Lead Tier‑3 level engineering tasks, service hardening, integration enablement, and support migrations or onboarding of workloads to M365.  Partner with cross‑functional teams for service integrations, identity dependencies, messaging flows, and connector governance across M365 workloads.    Power Platform Engineering & Environment Build‑Out    Design, build, and maintain Power Platform environments (Dev/Test/Prod), including Dataverse‑enabled environments, in alignment with M365 Engineering standards  Define and maintain naming conventions, environment architecture, security groups, provisioning workflows, and lifecycle management processes.  Implement AI‑enabled or Copilot‑related features where appropriate, following environment configuration practices  Govern connectors, DLP policy alignment, permissioning, environment boundary controls, and support intake processes for new environments and solutions.  Partner with business and citizen developers to safely scale Power Apps, Power Automate, and Dataverse usage.  Support Power Platform operations in line with resourcing functions for PowerApps/Power Platform support    Security, Governance & Compliance    Implement and maintain Power Platform governance (security, DLP, connector access, licensing alignment, audit requirements).  Collaborate with security, architecture, and governance forums (SA/ADRC, TDRC, etc.) to ensure environments meet internal standards.  Maintain compliance with change‑control processes, environment certifications, and enterprise documentation requirements.    Automation, Integration & Modernization    Build reusable frameworks, templates, and integrations supporting automation initiatives across the bank.  Partner with teams enabling Copilot and AI scenarios by ensuring the M365 and Power Platform foundations are robust and well‑governed.  Contribute engineering expertise for platform‑wide modernization initiatives (identity, lifecycle management, M365 logs centralization, COE toolkit optimization) as highlighted in.    Required Qualifications    4–7 years of experience in M365 platform engineering (SharePoint Online, Teams, Exchange Online, OneDrive, Entra ID).  Strong hands‑on experience with Power Platform (Power Apps, Power Automate, Dataverse, environment setup, DLP policies, connector architecture).  Familiarity with environment provisioning workflows, security groups, licensing models, and ServiceNow intake processes.  Strong understanding of identity, conditional access, and M365 security baselines.  Experience managing enterprise‑scale tenants, integrations, and governance models.  Ability to work across technical and business teams, driving standards, clarity, and secure design principles.    Preferred Qualifications    Experience implementing or supporting Copilot and AI‑enabled M365 workloads.  Knowledge of Power App governance, Power Platform COE toolkit, or Dynamics 365 integration.  Experience with scripting (PowerShell, Graph API) and automation frameworks.  Microsoft certifications (MS‑100, MS‑102, PL‑200, PL‑400).              Salary   :         $75,900.00 - $141,900.00           Pay Type:          Salaried   The above represents BMO Financial Group’s pay range and type.    Salaries will vary based on factors such as location, skills, experience, education, and qualifications for the role, and may include a commission structure. Salaries for part-time roles will be pro-rated based on number of hours regularly worked. For commission roles, the salary listed above represents BMO Financial Group’s expected target for the first year in this position.    BMO Financial Group’s total compensation package will vary based on the pay type of the position and may include performance-based incentives, discretionary bonuses, as well as other perks and rewards. BMO also offers health insurance, tuition reimbursement, accident and life insurance, and retirement savings plans. To view more details of our benefits, please visit:       https://jobs.bmo.com/global/en/Total-Rewards             About Us     At BMO we are driven by a shared Purpose: Boldly Grow the Good in business and life. It calls on us to create lasting, positive change for our customers, our communities and our people. By working together, innovating and pushing boundaries, we transform lives and businesses, and power economic growth around the world.    As a member of the BMO team you are valued, respected and heard, and you have more ways to grow and make an impact. We strive to help you make an impact from day one – for yourself and our customers. We’ll support you with the tools and resources you need to reach new milestones, as you help our customers reach theirs. From in-depth training and coaching, to manager support and network-building opportunities, we’ll help you gain valuable experience, and broaden your skillset.    To find out more visit us at     https://jobs.bmo.com/ca/en    .    BMO is committed to an inclusive, equitable and accessible workplace. By learning from each other’s differences, we gain strength through our people and our perspectives. Accommodations are available on request for candidates taking part in all aspects of the selection process. To request accommodation, please contact your recruiter.    Note to Recruiters: BMO does not accept unsolicited resumes from any source other than directly from a candidate. Any unsolicited resumes sent to BMO, directly or indirectly, will be considered BMO property. BMO will not pay a fee for any placement resulting from the receipt of an unsolicited resume. A recruiting agency must first have a valid, written and fully executed agency agreement contract for service to submit resumes.
